functions.name: TABLE
functions.description: Import rows from a Snowflake table into Excel. Returns headers + data rows.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Optional 2D array of column names to include

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to return (default 1000)

functions.name: SQL
functions.description: Run a Snowflake SQL query and return the results. Use :param_name for parameters.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: SQL query text. Use :param_name for named parameters.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Parameter pairs as a 2D range: [[name, value], ...]
